articles.title: T.N. Assembly election: EC orders State government to post new SPs for 4 districts, including Kancheepuram
articles.description: It adds that the officers transferred out must not be posted in any poll-related posts till the completion of the election

articles.title: Smoke rises over Beirut suburbs after massive Israeli airstrike
articles.description: Smoke rose over the skyline of Beirut following airstrikes as Israel continued to escalate its war on Hezbollah.

topStories.title: Guest on call about US-Iran conflict? Elon Musk joined PM Modi-Donald Trump call, says Report
topStories.description: It was unclear why Elon Musk was on the call or whether he spoke, mentioned the report

topStories.title: Supreme Court flags repeated breaches of law on disclosure of sexual assault survivors’ identity
topStories.description: Supreme Court warns of “general indifference” as case records reveal disclosure of sexual assault survivors’ identity, violating IPC Section 228A

topStories.title: BJD demands VAT reduction on petrol, diesel in Odisha
topStories.description: BJD spokesperson Lenin Mohanty said the ongoing conflict involving Israel, the United States and Iran has triggered concerns of a global fuel crisis

topStories.title: Unusual move: Elon Musk joins Trump-Modi call amid Iran war, says New York Times
topStories.description: Unusual move Elon Musk joins TrumpModi call amid Iran war says New York Times

topStories.title: US Palestinian activist says FBI foiled assassination plot against her
topStories.description: US law enforcement say man was arrested for plotting Molotov cocktail attack against activist Nerdeen Kiswani.

topStories.title: Memory chip giant SK hynix could help end ‘RAMmageddon’ with blockbuster US IPO
topStories.description: SK hynix’s potential U.S. listing could raise $10-$14 billion to help it build more capacity, encourage others to follow, and end the 'RAMmageddon' memory shortage.

topStories.title: 2026 Tamil Nadu Assembly election will be a close battle, says P. Chidambaram
topStories.description: Congress leader P. Chidambaram says 2026 Tamil Nadu Assembly election will not be one-sided like 2024 Lok Sabha polls; rules out inevitability of coalition government

topStories.title: Boots on ground may not be needed: Secretary of State Marco Rubio on Iran war
topStories.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio stated the U.S. aims to dismantle Iran's missile, drone, naval, and air force capabilities without ground troops, expecting operations to conclude in weeks. He clarified recent troop deployments offer President Trump options for contingencies, not for direct engagement in the conflict.

topStories.title: Rubio: US expects Iran war to end in ‘weeks, not months’
topStories.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio said the US expects its military operation in Iran to conclude in weeks, not months.

topStories.title: US diplomat Marco Rubio denounces settler violence, tolls in Hormuz strait
topStories.description: Rubio reiterated President Donald Trump's call for other countries to participate in securing the Strait of Hormuz.

topStories.title: Alleged Bomb Plot Against NYC Pro-Palestinian Activist Thwarted
topStories.description: Federal and New York City authorities arrested a man this week who they allege plotted to firebomb the Staten Island home of a pro-Palestinian activist, the latest in a string of politically motivated violence cases in the city.

topStories.title: 'Bibi Really Sold It': A Rebuke In Vance-Netanyahu Tense Call Amid Iran War
topStories.description: Another senior US official told Axios that, in their view, Vance remained the most viable path to a negotiated end to the war. "If the Iranians can't strike a deal with Vance, they don't get a deal....

dailyNews.description: The move is viewed as a strategic effort to bypass traditional media and communicate with the public without external interpretation.

dailyNews.title: Two Cuba-bound aid ships missing after leaving Mexico
dailyNews.description: Mexico's navy launches a rescue mission for ships delivering aid to Cuba, strained by food and fuel shortages amid a US embargo.

dailyNews.title: How close is the US to a quagmire in Iran?
dailyNews.description: The US has a 15-point plan to end the war on Iran, but what does the military reality show?

dailyNews.title: Mexico, Cuba Searching for Missing Aid Vessels as Island Reels
dailyNews.description: Mexico and Cuba are trying to find two small vessels that were delivering aid to the island as part of growing solidarity missions in the face of heightened US pressure on the government in Havana.

dailyNews.title: Iran’s football team honours children killed in Minab school airstrike
dailyNews.description: Iranian football players laid backpacks on a football pitch in Turkey to pay tribute to the children killed in a US-Isra

dailyNews.title: JD Vance leads first anti-fraud task force meeting on social programmes
dailyNews.description: Vance, speaking Friday before the task force held a closed-door meeting, said that the federal government for decades had not taken the issue of fraud seriously and that it needed to be tackled with ‘a whole-government approach.’

dailyNews.title: US-Based Burger Chain Awards Nearly Rs 15,00,00,000 To Employees In Bonuses. Here's Why
dailyNews.description: Five Guys said the bonuses are meant to recognise the "grit and dedication" of its employees

dailyNews.title: Iran Says Fresh US-Israeli Strikes Targeted Nuclear Sites; No Radiation Leak Reported
dailyNews.description: Strikes hit a heavy-water plant and a yellowcake production facility, Iranian news agencies reported.

dailyNews.title: Iran Football Team Hold School Bags In Protest Over Children Killed In School Bombing
dailyNews.description: Iran said more than 175 people, including 165 girls and their teachers, were killed on the first day of the joint US-Israeli strikes on the country.

dailyNews.title: ‘Humanitarian catastrophe’: While the world is focused on the war in Iran, something much worse is unfolding in Lebanon
dailyNews.description: Following the US-Israeli Operation Epic Fury against Iran, Israel's ground invasion of Lebanon has led to significant civilian casualties and displacement. UNICEF reports over 370,000 children have been uprooted, with many facing dire living conditions amid ongoing violence and humanitarian crises.

dailyNews.title: Congress releases list of 16 candidates for upcoming Puducherry elections
dailyNews.description: DPR Selvam will contest from Mannadipattu, while P Karthikeyan has been fielded from Oosudu.

dailyNews.title: White House launches new app for real-time updates, live streams ‘straight from the source’ - Details here
dailyNews.description: White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt called the app ‘incredible’ and Director of Communications Steven Cheung teased Easter Eggs ‘sprinkled throughout’

topStories.description: Stephen Miller pledges the White House anti-fraud task force, chaired by VP JD Vance, will demolish social services corruption costing taxpayers.

topStories.title: Trump rolls out plan to back farmers amid rising costs, pledging 'golden age'
topStories.description: President Donald said the EPA will change diesel emissions rules to save farmers billions, while announcing SBA loan guarantees and $12 billion in tariff relief.

topStories.title: Trump signs executive order ensuring TSA workers are paid during DHS shutdown
topStories.description: President Donald Trump on Friday signed an executive order instructing federal officials to ensure TSA employees get paid during the DHS shutdown.

topStories.title: Biden judge freezes Trump administration's move against AI firm, fueling battle over security authority
topStories.description: A federal judge's ruling paused an effort to sideline Anthropic while drawing backlash and support over the judiciary's role in Pentagon policy.

topStories.title: U.S. May Label Brazilian Gangs as Terror Groups, After Push by the Bolsonaros
topStories.description: The Trump administration is weighing declaring Brazil’s two largest drug gangs terrorist groups, after lobbying by the sons of jailed former President Jair Bolsonaro.

topStories.description: For 20 years, Tim O’Harrow has asked lawmakers to acknowledge that America’s food supply depends on immigrants. Politics went in the other direction.

dailyNews.title: Justice Dept. Scrutinizes Transgender Prisoner Housing in California and Maine
dailyNews.description: The investigations are the latest moves by the Trump administration to force prisons to house transgender women with male inmates.

dailyNews.title: Iran war rages, Strait of Hormuz still blocked as Trump pushes for a deal
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration expects Iran's formal response to its 15-point peace proposal today, as Tehran continues blocking the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Inside the near-impossible challenge of seizing Iran's nuclear stockpile
dailyNews.description: How hard would it be to remove or destroy Iran's nuclear stockpile? President Trump has said eliminating the country's nuclear weapons capability is a key objective of his military campaign against Iran, but U.S. military experts say it would be one of the riskiest special operations missions ever attempted.

dailyNews.title: Ambitious, authoritarian and talking to Trump? The hard-liners rising in Iran
dailyNews.description: The Israeli military has systematically killed Iran’s top leaders, so when President Donald Trump said this week that talks are being held with Iran, the biggest question was: Who exactly is the U.S. talking to

dailyNews.title: Concerns about insider trading on the Iran war are growing. Can anyone police the bets?
dailyNews.description: Fears are growing about insider trading on U.S. policy and military plans on prediction markets. But the Trump administration has been slow to crack down.

dailyNews.title: WATCH:  Melania Trump showcases robot guest at WH summit
dailyNews.description: A walking, talking humanoid robot strolled side-by-side with first lady Melania Trump at the White House for the second day of her international technology summit.

dailyNews.title: Epstein victims sue Google and the Trump administration over alleged disclosure of personal information
dailyNews.description: A lawsuit filed in Northern California alleges that Google's AI features generated contact information for Epstein victims.

dailyNews.title: White House launches app touting Trump's record, with some key omissions
dailyNews.description: The app includes a link to report tips to Immigration and Customs Enforcement.

dailyNews.title: Oil prices close at highest level since 2022 as Iran negotiations fail to ease supply fears
dailyNews.description: Oil prices traded higher after U.S. President Donald Trump said Iran had allowed 10 oil tankers to pass through the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.
